# Slides QA Snapshot (2026-04-24)

Scope: current slide module setup and recently added story/audit artifacts.

## QA Commands Run

- `npm run typecheck` ✅ pass
- `npm run lint` ✅ pass
  - `check-tokens` clean
  - `check-stories` clean (`165` story files)
- `npm run test:smoke` ✅ pass (`27/27`)

## Direct Answer: Frontend + Module Button Status

- **Module button is set up** in the hub via module registry + `HubModuleList`/`ModuleCard`.
- **Slides route is set up** and permission-gated (`/slides`, `useModuleAccess('slides')`).
- **Slides frontend exists**, but current UI is an import/parser surface (file import + pasted HTML parse + warnings + JSON output), not a full editor workflow yet.

## Evidence

- Hub wiring: `src/app/page.tsx`, `src/components/hub/HubModuleList.tsx`, `src/components/hub/ModuleCard.tsx`, `src/modules/registry.ts`
- Slides page: `src/app/slides/page.tsx`
- Parser: `src/components/slides/html-import.ts`
- Smoke tests: `tests/e2e/frontend-smoke.spec.ts` (includes hub-to-slides navigation and slide parser tests)

## Continued Gaps (Post-QA)

1. `US-SLD-020..025` (core FE editor): no on-canvas editing surface yet (selection, drag/resize, text tooling, multi-select, undo/redo, keyboard-first editing).
2. `US-SLD-030..032` (FE/BE foundation): no persisted slide/template schema and no My Slides/Template Library CRUD flow.
3. `US-SLD-031` (save/autosave): no save state contract (`dirty/saving/saved/error`) tied to backend persistence.
4. `US-SLD-033` (export): no production HTML/PDF export pipeline from slide state.
5. `US-SLD-034` (reliability): no revision conflict handling or crash recovery path.
6. `US-SLD-036` (integration coverage): parser smoke exists, but no end-to-end FE/BE regression suite for slide lifecycle flows.

## Resolved in This Pass

- `US-SLD-004` copy alignment: module/route copy now reflects import-first scope and clearly labels canvas editing/export as coming soon.
